name: video-template-retro-hk-wuxia-film-aesthetic
title: Retro HK Wuxia Film Aesthetic

title_i18n.zh-CN: 复古港式武侠电影美学
title_i18n.zh-TW: 復古港式武俠電影美學
title_i18n.ja: レトロ香港武俠映画の美学
title_i18n.fr: Esthétique rétro des films Wuxia de Hong Kong
title_i18n.es: Estética retro de películas Wuxia de Hong Kong
title_i18n.pt-BR: Estética retrô de filmes Wuxia de Hong Kong
title_i18n.it: Estetica retrò dei film Wuxia di Hong Kong
title_i18n.vi: Thẩm mỹ phim Wuxia Hồng Kông hoài cổ
title_i18n.pl: Retro estetyka filmów Wuxia z Hongkongu
title_i18n.id: Estetika Film Wuxia Hong Kong Retro
title_i18n.ar: الطابع الجمالي لأفلام Wuxia الكلاسيكية من هونغ كونغ
title_i18n.tr: Retro Hong Kong Wuxia Film Estetiği

description: A complex multi-part video prompt recreating 80s-90s Hong Kong Wuxia film aesthetics, featuring a character transformation from a cat to a human with stylized shots.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 复刻80-90年代香港武侠片美学风格的复杂多段视频提示词，呈现角色从猫到人的变身过程及风格化镜头。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 重現80-90年代香港武俠片美學風格的複雜多段視訊提示詞，呈現角色從貓到人的變身過程及風格化鏡頭。
description_i18n.ja: 80～90年代の香港武俠映画の美学を再現する複雑なマルチパート動画プロンプト。猫から人間への変身シーンをスタイライズされた映像で表現。
description_i18n.ko: 80~90년대 홍콩 무협 영화 미학을 재현하는 복합 멀티파트 비디오 프롬프트로, 고양이에서 인간으로 변신하는 캐릭터와 스타일화된 샷을 특징으로 합니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein komplexer mehrteiliger Video-Prompt, der die Ästhetik der Hongkong-Wuxia-Filme der 80er-90er Jahre nachbildet und die Verwandlung einer Figur von einer Katze zu einem Menschen mit stilisierten Aufnahmen zeigt.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt vidéo complexe en plusieurs parties recréant l'esthétique des films Wuxia hongkongais des années 80-90, avec une transformation de personnage d'un chat en humain et des plans stylisés.
description_i18n.ru: Сложный многокомпонентный видеопромпт, воссоздающий эстетику гонконгских фильмов Wuxia 80-90-х годов с превращением персонажа из кота в человека и стилизованными кадрами.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt de video complejo de varias partes que recrea la estética de las películas Wuxia de Hong Kong de los años 80-90, presentando la transformación de un personaje de gato a humano con tomas estilizadas.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt de vídeo complexo em várias partes que recria a estética dos filmes Wuxia de Hong Kong dos anos 80-90, apresentando uma transformação de personagem de gato para humano com cenas estilizadas.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt video complesso in più parti che ricrea l'estetica dei film Wuxia di Hong Kong degli anni '80-'90, con la trasformazione di un personaggio da gatto a umano e inquadrature stilizzate.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt video phức tạp nhiều phần tái hiện thẩm mỹ phim Wuxia Hồng Kông thập niên 80-90, với cảnh biến hình nhân vật từ mèo thành người và các cảnh quay phong cách hóa.
description_i18n.pl: Złożony wieloczęściowy prompt wideo odtwarzający estetykę hongkońskich filmów Wuxia z lat 80-90, przedstawiający transformację postaci z kota w człowieka ze stylizowanymi ujęciami.
description_i18n.id: Prompt video multi-bagian yang kompleks untuk menciptakan kembali estetika film Wuxia Hong Kong era 80-90an, menampilkan transformasi karakter dari kucing menjadi manusia dengan shot bergaya.
description_i18n.nl: Een complexe meerdelige videoprompt die de esthetiek van Hongkongse Wuxia-films uit de jaren '80-'90 herschept, met een karaktertransformatie van kat naar mens en gestileerde shots.
description_i18n.ar: موجه فيديو معقد متعدد الأجزاء يعيد إنشاء الطابع الجمالي لأفلام Wuxia من هونغ كونغ في الثمانينات والتسعينات، ويتضمن تحول شخصية من قطة إلى إنسان بلقطات منمقة.
description_i18n.tr: 80-90'ların Hong Kong Wuxia film estetiğini yeniden yaratan, bir karakterin kediden insana dönüşümünü stilize çekimlerle gösteren karmaşık çok parçalı video promptu.
description_i18n.uk: Складний багатокомпонентний відеопромпт, що відтворює естетику гонконгських фільмів Wuxia 80-90-х років з перетворенням персонажа з кота на людину та стилізованими кадрами.
description_i18n.en: A complex multi-part video prompt recreating 80s-90s Hong Kong Wuxia film aesthetics, featuring a character transformation from a cat to a human with stylized shots.

query.en: core_style: 80s-90s Shaw Brothers film style, early Hong Kong Wuxia drama aesthetics, nostalgic Chinese Wuxia movies, vintage TV quality, warm tones with high saturation palette, retro film grain texture, slight Technicolor chromatic aberration, classic studio backdrop feel, soft stage lighting. visual_quality: 35mm film photography, physical film defects, vintage film texture, subtle chromatic dispersion, soft focus effect, slight light flicker, strong bloom on highlight surfaces. character_modeling: female_character - classic 80s period drama makeup, black eyeliner, peach-pink lip balm, exquisite braids with pink ribbons and flower accessories, traditional light blue and white Hanfu with floral embroidery and silk texture. male_character - classic Wuxia young scholar appearance, long hair tied with a white ribbon at the waist, signature sideburns, clean-shaven face, pure white scholar/knight robe. script_and_storyboard: logic - sitcom editing logic with early physical transition effects. scenes: shot_1, [Close-up, a young woman looks affectionately at a black and white cow cat on a wooden table. Dialogue: 'If only you could turn into a handsome guy.'] shot_2, [Medium shot, the cow cat is licking its paws, then a burst of retro white physical smoke effect erupts in the center of the screen.] shot_3, [Transformation, smoke clears, a handsome man in white robes appears where the cat was.] shot_4, [Over-the-shoulder shot, the woman looks surprised and happy, reaching out to touch the man's shoulder or chest. Dialogue: 'Wow, you really became a handsome guy!'] shot_5, [Medium shot, the man has a serious expression, gesturing with orchid fingers and speaking in a charming tone. Dialogue: 'Did you forget you already neutered me? I've changed now, I'm your sister!'] shot_6, [Close-up, the woman is stunned in place, expression shocked. Dialogue: 'Ah!?'] audio_and_post_production: 'Puff' transformation sound effect, nostalgic Hong Kong background music, AI voiceover with 'old movie' or 'TVB dubbing style' accent, duration 00:30.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：core_style: 80s-90s Shaw Brothers film style, early Hong Kong Wuxia drama aesthetics, nostalgic Chinese Wuxia movies, vintage TV quality, warm tones with high saturation palette, retro film grain texture, slight Technicolor chromatic aberration, classic studio backdrop feel, soft stage lighting. visual_quality: 35mm film photography, physical film defects, vintage film texture, subtle chromatic dispersion, soft focus effect, slight light flicker, strong bloom on highlight surfaces. character_modeling: female_character - classic 80s period drama makeup, black eyeliner, peach-pink lip balm, exquisite braids with pink ribbons and flower accessories, traditional light blue and white Hanfu with floral embroidery and silk texture. male_character - classic Wuxia young scholar appearance, long hair tied with a white ribbon at the waist, signature sideburns, clean-shaven face, pure white scholar/knight robe. script_and_storyboard: logic - sitcom editing logic with early physical transition effects. scenes: shot_1, [Close-up, a young woman looks affectionately at a black and white cow cat on a wooden table. Dialogue: 'If only you could turn into a handsome guy.'] shot_2, [Medium shot, the cow cat is licking its paws, then a burst of retro white physical smoke effect erupts in the center of the screen.] shot_3, [Transformation, smoke clears, a handsome man in white robes appears where the cat was.] shot_4, [Over-the-shoulder shot, the woman looks surprised and happy, reaching out to touch the man's shoulder or chest. Dialogue: 'Wow, you really became a handsome guy!'] shot_5, [Medium shot, the man has a serious expression, gesturing with orchid fingers and speaking in a charming tone. Dialogue: 'Did you forget you already neutered me? I've changed now, I'm your sister!'] shot_6, [Close-up, the woman is stunned in place, expression shocked. Dialogue: 'Ah!?'] audio_and_post_production: 'Puff' transformation sound effect, nostalgic Hong Kong background music, AI voiceover with 'old movie' or 'TVB dubbing style' accent, duration 00:30.
